chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR. Criminal Transfer Application No. S- 11 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 02.02.2024. Mr. Sahib Khan Panhwar, Advocate for the applicant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Additional Prosecutor General. -.-.-. Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate files power on behalf of respondent No.1, taken on record. After hearing this Criminal Transfer Application at some length, it is disposed of with consent in the terms that learned 3rd Additional Sessions Judge, Naushehro Feroze where Criminal Bail Application No.2727/2023 Re. Khadim Hussain vs. The State in crime No.62/2023 of Police Station Mithiani, District Naushehro Feroze under sections 302, 324,34 PPC is pending is directed to decide the same on merit in accordance with law after hearing both the parties within a period of one month. J U D G E Irfan/PA
